decisions.question: Should plain 'tsuku update-registry' (no flags) force-fetch all cached recipes regardless of TTL, or should it keep the TTL skip and instead surface a hint (e.g., 'run --all to force refresh') in the 'already fresh' output?

Should the TTL-bypass for explicit refresh live in the command layer (routing to the existing private forceRegistryRefreshAll) or should CachedRegistry gain a new API to express the distinction explicitly?
decisions.chosen: Delete forceRegistryRefreshAll and --all flag; inline the force loop in runRegistryRefreshAll
